name: Risk Sentinel — GDELT Customs Intelligence Ingestion

nodes.name: Cron Trigger (Every 2h)
nodes.notes: Runs every 2 hours to fetch fresh GDELT customs-relevant articles

parameters.name: query
parameters.value: (customs OR tariff OR "trade war" OR embargo OR sanction OR "supply chain" OR "trade route" OR "port disruption") sourcelang:eng

nodes.name: GDELT — Customs & Trade Intelligence
nodes.notes: Fetches last 24h of customs/tariff/trade articles from GDELT Doc API. Rate limit: 1 request per 5 seconds.

parameters.name: query
parameters.value: ("strait of hormuz" OR "suez canal" OR "panama canal" OR "malacca strait" OR "taiwan strait" OR gibraltar OR "bab el mandeb" OR piracy OR "naval blockade") sourcelang:eng

nodes.name: GDELT — Critical Trade Routes
nodes.notes: Fetches articles about critical maritime chokepoints (Suez, Hormuz, Panama, etc.)

parameters.name: query
parameters.value: (semiconductor OR chip OR "rare earth" OR lithium OR nickel OR oil OR LNG OR grain OR wheat OR fertilizer OR pharma) (shortage OR disruption OR price OR export OR ban) sourcelang:eng

nodes.name: GDELT — Commodity Disruptions
nodes.notes: Fetches articles about critical commodity disruptions relevant to customs risk.

nodes.name: Risk Scoring Engine (8 Dimensions)
nodes.notes: Implements the 8-dimension risk scoring algorithm from the PhD spec. Weights: EventSeverity 0.18, SourceConfidence 0.10, TradeExposure 0.18, RouteCriticality 0.14, CommoditySensitivity 0.12, EscalationMomentum 0.10, CustomsRelevance 0.12, GeophysicalImpact 0.06.

nodes.name: Merge & Deduplicate Articles
nodes.notes: Merges articles from all 3 GDELT queries and deduplicates by URL

nodes.name: Filter & Classify Alerts
nodes.notes: Filters out Low-risk articles (score < 25) and groups remaining by risk level

nodes.name: Push to Risk Sentinel API
nodes.notes: Sends scored and filtered alerts to Risk Sentinel's ingestion endpoint. Set RISK_SENTINEL_WEBHOOK_URL in n8n environment variables.
